meaning: n.&adj.[纺]犬牙织纹(的),犬牙花纹(的)
examples: Available in the following colors: Paisley Taupe, Houndstooth, Thunder, and Windsor.
Her houndstooth jacket, black fur scarf and black hat gives her a sophisticated look of higher society.
Yet like a love that slipped away, the houndstooth heels still haunt my thoughts on every return to Florence.
There were many beautifully constructed plaid and houndstooth jackets, short suits and coats.
An oversized houndstooth print was shown in various shapes ranging from a skirt with a leather border to a boyfriend sweater.
